description: Merge conflict resolved at tier auto-resolve. Branch: overstory/status-costs-builder/grove-53e2. Agent: status-costs-builder. Conflicting files: src/commands/mod.rs, src/main.rs.

Auto-resolve merge (tier 2) silently drops content when branches modify overlapping files. When parallel leads create their own stubs of shared files (types.rs, errors.rs, main.rs), auto-resolve keeps incoming branch and discards main content.
resolution: Merge in dependency order (foundation first). For branches with overlapping files, extract only unique files via git show and integrate manually with a dedicated lead.

title: Phase 0 parallel decomposition and merge order
rationale: 4 parallel leads for types, config, database, CLI. Merge in dependency order (types first). When leads create stubs of shared files, use dedicated integration leads to extract unique content and adapt to authoritative types.
